note: Catalog auto-published by catalog-publish.yml. Module refs are pinned to their release tag when triggered by a module release; otherwise 'main'.

modules.name: agents-md
modules.description: Write a skeleton AGENTS.md. Single and monorepo layouts use separate verbatim templates with PROJECT_NAME and ORG substituted.

modules.name: apm-install
modules.description: Install APM package primitives and compile Codex/Claude steering.

modules.name: ci-github-actions
modules.description: Generate a .github/workflows/ci.yml sized to the project's actual stack — one job per active language overlay, matrix trimmed to pinned runtime versions, action refs pinned to current majors.

modules.name: codex-config
modules.description: Scaffold a project-scoped .codex/config.toml with override guidance.

modules.name: core-identity
modules.description: Capture the project's identity answers (name, org, layout, license, etc.). No filesystem work — this module is the upstream input provider for all other modules.

modules.name: dirs-scaffold
modules.description: Create the standard directory structure with .gitkeep files. Supports single and monorepo layouts.

modules.name: env-example
modules.description: Derive .env.example from the resolved stack (framework_python / framework_ts / extra_env_hints). Agent maps the stack to a structured env_keys list; python step writes placeholder-only .env.example. Hard-refuses any placeholder that looks like a real credential.

modules.name: git-init
modules.description: Run git init in the project directory and clear macOS provenance xattr on .git/.

modules.name: github-repo
modules.description: Create a GitHub repository and wire the origin remote via gh or gh-api.py.

modules.name: gitignore-generate
modules.description: Compose a .gitignore from vendored CC0 github/gitignore templates plus a project-specific custom block. Optionally fetches additional templates on demand.

modules.name: justfile-write
modules.description: Write a skeleton justfile with default/test/lint/build/dev/clean targets. Skipped when use_just=false.

modules.name: lang-go
modules.description: Add Go tooling (go mod, golangci-lint) to a scaffolded project. Appends Go .gitignore entries and pre-commit-golang hooks.

modules.name: lang-python
modules.description: Add Python tooling (uv, ruff, pytest) to a scaffolded project. Appends Python .gitignore entries and ruff pre-commit hooks.

modules.name: lang-rust
modules.description: Add Rust tooling (cargo, rustfmt, clippy) to a scaffolded project. Appends Rust .gitignore entries and pre-commit-rust hooks.

modules.name: lang-ts
modules.description: Add TypeScript tooling (bun/pnpm, tsconfig, biome, prettier) to a scaffolded project. Appends Node .gitignore entries and biome/prettier pre-commit hooks.

modules.name: license-write
modules.description: Write a LICENSE file from one of the 13 SPDX licenses vendored from the GitHub Licenses API. Year and author are filled at runtime (SC-001 carve-out: these lines vary). Optionally fetches the latest body on demand (dynamic_fetch=true).

modules.name: mcp-config
modules.description: Writes MCP server entries from public refs or a selected marketplace into .mcp.json.

modules.name: org-policy
modules.description: Apply mandatory org conventions to a scaffolded project. Reads a pinned org policy manifest (from the fetched org source), maps frozen answers against org policy, and applies only the org-mandated overrides. Default-disabled; enable when an org source is pinned in sources.toml.

modules.name: package-add
modules.description: Create a new package directory inside a monorepo with path-traversal guards. Optionally resolves and writes a per-package manifest and workspace entry via Tier-2 resolver.

modules.name: precommit-setup
modules.description: Scaffold .pre-commit-config.yaml with commit-stage hygiene + pre-push secret scan, and vendor the close-keywords commit-msg scripts into .pre-commit-hooks/.

modules.name: quality-hooks
modules.description: Write .agents/hooks/quality-languages from the quality_languages input list.

modules.name: readme-draft
modules.description: Draft a project README.md from frozen scaffold facts (project name, org, layout, language, framework, resolved stack, license). Agent drafts; gate shows the draft; python step writes write-once. Never clobbers a hand-edited README.

modules.name: speckit-bridge
modules.description: Install and initialise speckit when spec_mode is lightweight or full.

modules.name: stack-adr
modules.description: Write a human-readable STACK.md (or ADR) from frozen stack decisions, and run a reproduce-only staleness advisory for pinned deps.
